title: Occupational Health and Safety Policy for Chemical Plant
scenario: Develop a comprehensive occupational health and safety policy for a large chemical plant, incorporating guidelines for worker safety, equipment maintenance, and emergency procedures. Generate an occupational health and safety policy document in standard business report format. Ensure the output is under 500 words and includes clear section headings and concise bullet points.
constraints: Must include a detailed section on personal protective equipment (PPE) and training requirements
Must use a formal business tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the output adheres to all specified formatting and content constraints.
Judge the professionalism and clarity of the policy language.
Check that the policy includes necessary procedures and guidelines for worker safety and equipment maintenance.
